use_cases: GDPR-compliant cookie consent collection on websites
Privacy policy acceptance for user data processing
Cookie preferences notification and consent mechanism
Legal compliance overlay for website visitors
Cookie notice display before granting site access
ai_summary: A lightweight cookie consent banner component displaying privacy information with an accept button, commonly used for GDPR and privacy compliance. Features a clean, minimal design with a cookie icon, descriptive text about data processing, and action buttons for acceptance or viewing more options.
